message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Beregning af BMI

hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 25
  BoxPadding 15
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BoxBorderColor #888888
  BoxBackgroundColor #E6E6E6
  ParticipantBorderColor #888888
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #EFEFEF
  ActorBorderColor #888888
  ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

actor bruger as Bruger
boundary "index.jsp" as Index
boundary "resultat.jsp" as ResultatJsp

box "BmiUtil" #E6E6E6
  participant "Initializer" as Initializer
end box

box "PresentationLayer" #E6E6E6
  control "FrontController" as FrontController
  participant "Command" as Command
  participant "Resultat" as Resultat
end box

box "LogicFacade" #E6E6E6
  participant "LogicFacade" as LogicFacade
end box

box "DBAccess" #E6E6E6
  participant "BmiMapper" as BmiMapper
end box

database "BmiDB" as BmiDB

Bruger -> Index : 1 start

== Initialization ==

Index -> Initializer : 2 getSportList()
Initializer --> Index : 3 ArrayList<Sport>

== Beregn BMI ==

Index -> FrontController : 4 doPost()
FrontController -> FrontController : 5 processRequest()
FrontController -> Command : 6 from()
Command --> FrontController : 7 Resultat
FrontController -> Resultat : 8 execute()
Resultat -> LogicFacade : 9 insertBmiItem()
LogicFacade -> BmiMapper : 10 insertBmiItem()
BmiMapper -> BmiDB : 11 executeQuery()
BmiDB --> BmiMapper : 12 OK
BmiMapper --> LogicFacade : 13 OK
LogicFacade --> Resultat : 14 OK
Resultat --> FrontController : 15 resultat
FrontController --> ResultatJsp : 16 forward()

@enduml
```
